metadata.source: Industry standards, OEM publications, technical literature

failure_modes.effects: Reduced pressure ratio, reduced airflow, increased compressor discharge temperature, reduced efficiency and output.
failure_modes.causes: Airborne particles, oil mist, salt ingress, poor inlet air filtration.
failure_modes.recommended_action: Perform online/offline compressor wash. Inspect and replace inlet air filters. Monitor trend.

failure_modes.effects: High exhaust gas temperature spread, flame instability, high CO/NOx, potential for combustor damage and flame-out.
failure_modes.causes: Fuel nozzle wear, fuel gas contamination, control valve (SRV/FSV) faults, gas leak test failure.
failure_modes.recommended_action: Perform borescope inspection of combustor cans. Inspect fuel nozzles, SRV, and FSV. Check fuel gas quality.

failure_modes.effects: High vibration, bearing temperature rise, potential for catastrophic rotor failure.
failure_modes.causes: Bearing wear, imbalance, misalignment, oil degradation.
failure_modes.recommended_action: Monitor vibration trend. Schedule vibration analysis and bearing inspection/replacement.

failure_modes.effects: Loss of turbine efficiency, potential for blade failure and catastrophic damage.
failure_modes.causes: High firing temperatures, thermal fatigue, cooling air blockage, foreign object damage.
failure_modes.recommended_action: Monitor hours and starts. Schedule borescope inspection. Plan for hot gas path (HGP) inspection during next outage.

failure_modes.failure_mode: Gas Fuel Stop Valve (FSV) / Speed Ratio Valve (SRV) Fault
failure_modes.effects: Fuel control issues, leading to instability, flame-out, or failure to start.
failure_modes.causes: Mechanical wear, control signal issues, hydraulic failure, sticking valve.
failure_modes.recommended_action: Inspect and test FSV and SRV. Check control system feedback and hydraulics.

failure_modes.effects: Loss of lubrication, increased bearing temperatures, potential for bearing damage and seizure.
failure_modes.causes: Pump failure, filter clogging, oil contamination, low oil level, seal leak.
failure_modes.recommended_action: Inspect lube oil pumps and filters. Perform oil analysis. Check for leaks and ensure proper oil level.

failure_modes.effects: Reduced power output, overheating, potential for generator trip.
failure_modes.causes: AVR failure, cooling water system fault, hydrogen purity loss.
failure_modes.recommended_action: Check AVR and excitation system. Monitor hydrogen purity and cooling water system.
